## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code compiles without warnings (`make`).
- [ ] Logic adheres strictly to the Language Specification v0.2.
- [ ] Generated LLVM IR (`bery_out.ll`) is valid and executes cleanly.
- [ ] No AI tools were used in the generation of this code.
- [ ] Development logs have been updated.
